intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: YouTube Growth Mistakes to Avoid. Inconsistent niches, weak packaging, and ignoring retention graphs are common blockers. Fix packaging and retention before chasing upload volume or monetization myths.
mainSummary: Inconsistent niches, weak packaging, and ignoring retention graphs are common blockers. Fix packaging and retention before chasing upload volume or monetization myths.
